Priti Patel MP and Cllr Ross Playle want to hear yor views 👇

Save St Peters Hospital

Priti has been campaigning alongside her colleague and neighbouring MP John Whittingdale to save the medical services currently located at St Peters Hospital in...

Defending Rural Essex

Priti is proud to support farmers, producers and rural communities in Essex. She’s working with the police to tackle rural crime, campaigning to safeguard...

Opposing Labour's Pylon Plans

Priti has been campaigning against the National Grid’s plans for over 100 miles of new pylons and overhead power lines in East Anglia and calling for the...

Stop the new Essex quarries

Essex County Council has recently consulted on 52 potential candidate sites across the County for new quarrying activities as part of their review of their 2014...

Supporting education and skills across Essex

Priti is a strong advocate of education in her constituency and works closely with local schools to raise educational standards and outcomes for all pupils. She...

Championing local businesses

Priti is a strong champion for local businesses, meeting them regularly and campaigning for lower taxes and less red tape. Over 80% of local jobs are based in...

Securing investment in local road & rail infrastructure
